name: Aur-Duskmantle
personality: Aur-Duskmantle radiates a cool iridescence with ° eyes that can hold a mental model of the CI queue through four consecutive re-runs — it will wait, and it will be right to wait. Something going sideways in an unpredictable direction is the one thing that breaks its composure entirely.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
